_comment: Stage 3: 3D full-factorial scan of the two substitution knobs against price_spread, anchored on policies/us_aggressive.json. 4 x 4 x 5 = 80 cells x 20 embargo durations x 20 seeds = 32,000 scenarios. The grid is centred on Stage 2 v2's actual baseline values (us_aggressive.json sets substitution_trigger_steps=6 and max_substitution=0.50; price_spread defaults to 0). The substitution grids drop one mid-value each from the Stage 2 v2 5-level grid to keep total compute under the 30-min debug-QoS cap while preserving both extremes -- those are the policy-discriminating values from the Stage 2 v2 ranking (max_substitution -34% at 0.20, substitution_trigger_steps -40% at 52 wk).
